_comment: Fictional inbox-routing proposal batch (P60 drop folder). Models the atom's output contract for scenario S10: format-routable files carry a rule-backed route, content types wait for review, unknowns are flagged in place, quarantined files are never routed, and the whole batch requires human review. All names and content are invented.

proposals.after_approval: handler runs; file moves to Inbox/Processed/<date>/
handler runs; file moves to Inbox/Processed/<date>/

needs_review.note: needs a Claude session (inbox-routing atom) to read the content and run the injection guard before a route is proposed

unknown.note: unclassifiable from format; left in place

quarantined.note: injection guard verdict; never routed, listed verbatim
